features.name: wide constant right shift by variable
features.description: Code should include a right-shift operation where a large-width (256-bit) constant literal is shifted by a variable operand of narrower width (8-bit)

features.name: bit-select from wide shift expression
features.description: Code should include a single-bit output driven by a bit-select (index 0) of a wide shift expression result, testing whether synthesis preserves correct bit-level semantics through optimization passes
